compiled_state.title: As a plugin developer, pure change-detection tests are deleted and .test-index is updated
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Delete all tests classified as "delete" in the triage (pure change-detection tests with no behavioral value) and update .test-index to remove stale entries. Validate test suite health after each cleanup batch.
**Why**: These tests grep markdown source files for keywords and check section headings — they provide no behavioral verification and break on any prompt refactoring.
**Scope**:
- IN: Delete all "delete"-classified test files from the triage
- IN: Update .test-index to remove entries for deleted test files
- IN: Validate test suite health after each cleanup batch
- OUT: Writing replacement tests (separate story)
- OUT: Tests classified as "replace" or "keep"

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, all tests classified as "delete" in the triage are removed from the codebase
  ← Satisfies: "either deleted (pure change-detection with no behavioral value)"
- When this story is complete, .test-index entries for deleted test files are removed
  ← Satisfies: "Coordinate .test-index marker updates in the same commits as test deletions"
- When this story is complete, the test suite passes after all deletions
  ← Satisfies: "Test count for the DSO plugin stabilizes or decreases after cleanup"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic
  ← Satisfies: TDD done-of-done

## Considerations

- [Reliability] .test-index marker updates must be coordinated with test deletions in same commits
- [Reliability] Validate test suite health after each cleanup batch

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Done definition update: References to deleted tests in run-python-tests.sh KNOWN_FAILING array must also be removed.
comments.author: Test
